LanguageData.BandwidthCost.description: How much bandwidth this robot consumes when under mechanic control.
LanguageData.BandwidthCost.label: bandwidth cost
LanguageData.ControlTakingTime.description: How many seconds it will take for a mechanic to take control of this mech.
LanguageData.ControlTakingTime.label: control taking time
LanguageData.MechBandwidth.description: How much bandwidth a robot has. More bandwidth allows a mechanic to produce and control more robots at the same time.\n\nLosing bandwidth means losing control of robots, leaving them without an overseer. Such mechs can eventually become feral if not re-dominated.
LanguageData.MechBandwidth.label: robot bandwidth
LanguageData.MechControlGroups.description: How many control groups this mechanic can direct independently. Each control group can be given its own separate orders.
LanguageData.MechControlGroups.label: robot control groups
LanguageData.MechEnergyLossPerHP.description: The amount of energy that this robot loses for every 100 damage repaired.
LanguageData.MechEnergyLossPerHP.label: repair energy cost
LanguageData.MechEnergyUsageFactor.description: A multiplier on how fast a robot consumes its energy reserves while operating.
LanguageData.MechEnergyUsageFactor.label: energy usage multiplier
LanguageData.MechFormingSpeed.description: A multiplier on the speed at which this mechanic can create new robots at a assembler.
LanguageData.MechFormingSpeed.label: robot assembly speed
LanguageData.MechRemoteRepairDistance.description: How far away a robot can be during remote repair.
LanguageData.MechRemoteRepairDistance.label: robot remote repair distance
LanguageData.MechRemoteShieldDistance.description: The maximum range at which a mechanic can place a shield on a robot.
LanguageData.MechRemoteShieldDistance.label: robot remote shield distance
LanguageData.MechRemoteShieldEnergy.description: The energy a remote shield will have when created by a mechanic.
LanguageData.MechRemoteShieldEnergy.label: robot remote shield energy
LanguageData.MechRepairSpeed.description: A multiplier on how fast a mechanic can repair robots.
LanguageData.MechRepairSpeed.label: robot repair speed
LanguageData.SubcoreEncodingSpeed.description: A multiplier on how fast a mechanic can solder circuitry.
LanguageData.SubcoreEncodingSpeed.label: circuitry soldering speed
LanguageData.WastepacksPerRecharge.description: How many toxic wastepacks this robot will generate at a RobCo recharger when going from 0 to 100% energy. Larger robots will generally create more toxic wastepacks.
LanguageData.WastepacksPerRecharge.label: wastepacks per recharge
